title: Contrast Security
description: Contrast Security provides AI Usage monitoring using its instrumentation runtime agents. Plans are in the works to provide defensive policy solutions as well to help with AI governance.

items: Correlate telemetry from agent step tracing, tool execution, & message logs.
Alert on anomalies;  e.g., goal reversal, unexpected plan depth, adversarial-input, excessive tool usage, or rapid inter-agent chatter.
